name: Apple MacBook Air 13-inch (M4, 2025)
introText: The MacBook Air 13-inch with M4 is Apple's best-selling laptop, delivering class-leading performance and 18-hour battery life in a fanless 1.24kg design for $1,299 CAD on Amazon.ca.
whatWorks: M4 chip delivers MacBook Pro-level performance in a fanless chassis — the Air runs the same chip as the base MacBook Pro 14, handling video editing, coding, and heavy multitasking without thermal throttling.
18-hour battery life is the best in class at this size — consistently outlasts competing Windows ultrabooks by 4–6 hours in real-world use, making it genuinely all-day portable without a charger.
worthKnowing: Only two Thunderbolt 4 ports — the Air has no HDMI or SD card slot. A hub or dock is needed for most desk setups, adding $50–100 to the effective cost.
256GB base storage fills up faster than expected for creative workflows — the step to 512GB adds $200 CAD but is worth it for anyone storing large files locally.

commonComplaints.title: Only two ports
commonComplaints.body: The M4 Air has two Thunderbolt 4/USB-C ports and no MagSafe, requiring a hub for external displays, USB-A devices, or SD cards.

commonComplaints.title: Base 256GB fills up quickly
commonComplaints.body: Users doing video, music, or photo work report the 256GB fills up within a year without active file management. Upgrading at purchase is the only option.

commonComplaints.title: No fan means occasional slow downs under extreme sustained load
commonComplaints.body: Compiling large codebases or rendering long videos sustained for 30+ minutes causes minor throttling. MacBook Pro 14 handles these workloads better.

verdict: The MacBook Air 13 M4 is the best all-around laptop at this price for most people — unmatched battery life, silent fanless operation, and genuine pro-level performance in a thin, light package. Unless you need sustained heavy compute or prefer Windows, this is the laptop to buy.

realBuyers.quote: Switched from a Dell XPS 13. Battery life alone makes it worth it — 14 hours on a normal work day. Nothing on Windows comes close.
Using it for video editing in Final Cut. Exports 4K in minutes. No fans, no heat. Wild how fast this is for the price.
Perfect travel laptop. Light, fast, charges over USB-C so I don't need to carry a special adapter.

sources.title: MacBook Air M4 Review — The Verge

metaDescription: MacBook Air 13 M4 review Canada: 16GB RAM, 256GB SSD, 18-hr battery, 1.24kg. $1,299 CAD on Amazon.ca. Best overall laptop for most Canadians.
